title: ginkgo biloba f. aurea
intro: Ginkgo biloba f. aurea is a cultivar of the ginkgo biloba tree, known for its distinctive golden-yellow leaves and is considered one of the oldest living tree species. The medicinal properties of Ginkgo biloba f. aurea lie in its ability to improve blood flow to the brain and other parts of the body, which is attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Ginkgo biloba f. aurea include enhanced cognitive function, improved memory, and reduced symptoms of anxiety and depression, as well as its potential to aid in the prevention of age-related macular degeneration. Ginkgo biloba f. aurea is often prepared in herbal supplements, teas, and capsules, which can be found in various health food stores and online.
